title: Hyper Backrooms - found footage
body:
## Hyper Backrooms: Found Footage
The Best Backrooms Experience for Minecraft

## How To Play
To enter the Backroom world, once you create a world, you have to find a way to get buried, such as dropping blocks, sand, or gravel on yourself. Then you will be sent to the Backrooms.

Once you are in the backrooms, try to get out of them.

## Basic Controls
- Click "W" twice - Run
- Shift - Sneak
- R - Flashlight
- V - Set Up Voice Chat

## Special thanks

- SpacePotato (creator of the mod "Backrooms: Found Footage")
- The creators of all the other mods used in my modpack
